text: I feel a curious detachment, observing through glass the people in the first scene as they partake in some communal act of learning or business, separated by the crystalline barrier that invites reflection on boundaries—physical and intellectual. The second scene, vibrant and filled with references to research and development, sharpens my sense of possibility and progress. There's a palpable excitement here, a sense that within these walls, ideas are constantly being conceived and recombined, urging me to ponder my own role within such creative currents.
